heading: Wallaroo Plain vs Wallerberdina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wallaroo Plain, South Australia and Wallerberdina, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wallaroo Plain has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Wallerberdina (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wallaroo Plain or Wallerberdina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wallaroo Plain has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Wallerberdina scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wallaroo Plain scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wallerberdina scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wallaroo Plain or Wallerberdina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wallaroo Plain has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
